bottlenecks.name: SSM output matvec (ssmo)
bottlenecks.description: Large matvec: 6144 hidden dim input × 5120 output rows

bottlenecks.name: SSM wqkv_gate (re-g)
bottlenecks.description: Matvec: 5120 hidden → 6144 SSM hidden, computed twice per layer
optimization_ideas: Avoid redundant computation (save buffer before deltanet overwrites it)

completed_optimizations.name: Add tracing for SSM FFN operations
completed_optimizations.impact: Revealed that 'pre' was hiding 8.27ms of SSM FFN work
completed_optimizations.details: SSM FFN (porm, fg+fu, mul, fd, res1) was not traced, making it look like loop overhead

attempted_optimizations.name: Extra buffer for redundant wqkv_gate computation
attempted_optimizations.impact: Would save ~3.7ms (10% improvement) by avoiding recomputation
attempted_optimizations.details: Added extra sg buffer for ssm_gate_saved, but caused logits copy errors. Buffer layout change had unintended side effects.

next_steps: Profile memory bandwidth utilization with nsys
Check register pressure in matvec kernels
